H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=95, mean=7.15 (strong). AutoGluon predicts 6.859. Highest HEALING YouTube reach (30 views) but missing retention data.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Top overstimulation aid with consistent results, under-discovered online.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.92 (strong). Panel highlights settlement time variability. AutoGluon aligns with observed efficacy.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Good stress relief with balanced outcomes, though settling time varies.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04 (meaningful). Tight variance. Panel notes high caregiver usage in qualitative data.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Reliable overstimulation help, especially for caregivers.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22 (strong). AutoGluon predicts 7.838 for anxiety zone. Qualitative data shows moderate improvement (63% positive). Suggests strong efficacy with low YouTube reach (7 views).
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most tested anxiety protocol shows strong results, helping most listeners feel calmer.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94 (meaningful). Tighter variance than L1. Panel notes mixed music opinions and settle times. Suggests consistency with design intent.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Good anxiety support with quicker settling, though music reactions vary.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08 (meaningful). Rapid settling reported. Panel divided on rhythm comfort vs. music neutrality.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Effective anxiety relief for many, with clear rhythm comfort.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35 (meaningful). Structurally appropriate for crisis. AutoGluon predicts higher efficacy (7.955) for cross-bucket use.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Helps in crisis but works best for moderate distress. Listeners in extreme states may need multiple sessions.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=33, mean=6.52 (meaningful). Highest crisis mean. Panel flags music opinion split (neutral vs. loved).
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Best crisis protocol for balancing music preference and calm, with clear improvement.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52 (meaningful). Fastest crisis settling. Panel notes bimodal improvement distribution.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Quick crisis relief for some, but uneven music reception.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=54, mean=7.19 (strong). AutoGluon predicts 7.539. Panel flags high self-listener ratio.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Effective sleep support with high self-user satisfaction.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09 (meaningful). Mixed settlement times. Panel notes high client/patient proxy usage.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Sleep aid works well for clients and supporters, though some need longer sessions.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=28, mean=7.07 (meaningful). Panel highlights rhythm opinions (slightly busy).
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Helps sleep for many, though some find the rhythm slightly busy.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46 (meaningful). Panel highlights rhythm opinions (slightly busy). AutoGluon predicts higher efficacy.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Focus aid works but some find the rhythm distracting.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19 (meaningful). Panel notes balance in feedback. AutoGluon aligns with observed efficacy.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Effective focus support with balanced feedback.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=35, mean=7.63 (meaningful). Highest overall mean. Panel recommends promotional push.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=34, mean=6.74 (meaningful). Panel flags low positive percentage (53%). AutoGluon suggests cross-bucket use.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Creative flow support shows mixed results, better for mild focus needs.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.79 (meaningful). Tight variance. Panel notes significant improvement in qualitative data.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Good creative aid with noticeable improvement for most.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28 (developing). Highest THRIVING mean. Panel flags small sample size.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Promising creative flow tool, though small sample size.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=25, mean=7.04 (meaningful). Panel notes long settlement times (~20 min). AutoGluon suggests cross-bucket use.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Maintenance support helps balance, though some need longer sessions.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68 (meaningful). Panel highlights music opinion split.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed maintenance results - explore music preferences.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.93 (developing). Panel notes non-settle responses.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=39, mean=6.74 (meaningful). Panel highlights cross-bucket routing in AutoGluon.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood energy aid works across multiple uses.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=22, mean=6.36 (meaningful). Panel highlights low pct_pos (45%).
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivation aid underperforms - check subgroup needs.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.21 (developing). Panel notes slow settlement.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=13, mean=7.15 (developing). Panel flags high positive percentage (62%).
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Developing motivation tool with positive signs.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.75 (meaningful). Panel flags cross-bucket routing to X-ME-L1/L2.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Mind clarity aid works but some need adjustments.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=16, mean=6.81 (developing). Panel notes high YouTube views (12) for TRANSFORMING.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Emerging clarity tool with good YouTube reach.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.7 (developing). Panel consensus on urgent redesign need.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Early clarity protocol needs urgent redesign.

sphere_commentary.overview:
Aggregate data shows meaningful efficacy signals across all three series, with HEALING leading in consistency and sample size.
• HEALING protocols demonstrate strong outcomes (mean 6.98) with low variance, aligned with nervous system regulation intent.
• THRIVING matches HEALING's mean (6.96), excelling in Focus & Clarity (T-FC-L3: 7.63).
• TRANSFORMING's lower mean (6.59) and higher variance align with its ascending-arc design for low-affect states.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series performance reflects design intent, with distinct response profiles.
• HEALING: High consistency across protocols, crisis subsets meet structural expectations.
• THRIVING: Competitive means, Focus & Clarity protocols show strongest outcomes.
• TRANSFORMING: Expected higher variance, notable subgroup effects in Mind & Clarity protocols.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Key anomalies warrant targeted investigation.
• X-MC-L3 (n=10, mean=5.7, std=2.45): Bimodal distribution likely indicates population mismatch or subgroup effect.
• T-MB-L2 (drift sim=0.633): Significant cross-run drift suggests evolving data patterns or instability.
• H-CR-L1 (mean=6.35): Structurally appropriate for acute distress but flag for subgroup analysis.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
High-priority development actions emerge from convergent signals.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Adjust H-CR-L1/L2/L3 hold phases to enhance crisis intervention efficacy (3 analyzers).
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Create L2 variants for X-MC-L3 and X-MD-L1 to address subgroup mismatches (2 analyzers).
• Boost H-OS-L1 discoverability through curated playlists (2 analyzers).
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding analysis highlights analytical evolution and relationships.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: 22 protocols show significant drift (sim<0.85), indicating shifting data patterns or instability.
• CROSS-PROTOCOL CLUSTERS: Strong intra-series clustering (e.g., H-OS-L1/L2/L3), with T-CF-L2 as most distinct.
• Confidence note: Drift signals are meaningful but require more runs for full stability assessment.
